sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after clicking the M dots. The dots are still pink (M). The dots are still pink. Let me check the current state to see if they changed color.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("Nodes:", len(nodes))
for n in nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    cr = sum(p[0] for p in b)/len(b)
    cc = sum(p[1] for p in b)/len(b)
    print(n['id'], n['color'], n['pixels'], int(cr), int(cc))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
